name: @fairmint/open-captable-protocol-daml-js
description: Open CapTable Protocol (OpenCapTable-v34) DAML contracts and generated JavaScript bindings published as @fairmint/open-captable-protocol-daml-js.
author: Fairmint

scripts.clean: for pkg in OpenCapTable-v34 Test; do (cd $pkg && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm clean); done
scripts.codegen: npm run build && cd OpenCapTable-v34 && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm codegen-js && cd .. && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts && tsx scripts/create-package-index.ts && tsx scripts/create-root-index.ts && tsx scripts/fix-splice-refs.ts && npm run build:ts && tsx scripts/stage-npm-opencaptable-dar.ts && npm run build:npm-runtime-lib
scripts.create-factory:ocp: npm run codegen && tsx scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network devnet && tsx scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format:fix
scripts.lint:daml: EXIT_CODE=0; for pkg in OpenCapTable-v34 Test; do echo "Linting $pkg..."; (cd $pkg && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm damlc lint) || EXIT_CODE=1; done; exit $EXIT_CODE
scripts.package:manifest: npm run package:prep && npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts > /tmp/npm-pack.json 2>/dev/null && jq -r '.[0].files[].path' /tmp/npm-pack.json | sort | tsx scripts/collapse-manifest.ts > generated/npm-manifest.txt
scripts.package:prep: npm run codegen && npm run update-version && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts && tsx scripts/create-package-index.ts && tsx scripts/create-root-index.ts && tsx scripts/fix-splice-refs.ts && npm run build:npm-runtime-lib
scripts.test: cd Test && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm test --show-coverage --color --coverage-ignore-choice splice-amulet:.*
scripts.verify-package: tsx scripts/verify-package-imports.ts && npm run verify-merged-lib && npm run test:imports
